rationale: Matches the dominant idempotency idiom in session_store.py (28+ INSERT OR IGNORE call sites); record_commit_event (lines 1222-1272) provides a copy-with-rename template. Use full 64-char SHA-256 hexdigest at the ENH-2496 call site instead of the 16-char _hash_args() slice to close the 64-bit collision risk for the UNIQUE column, without altering the shared helper or tool_events row identity.
rule: Option B — INSERT OR IGNORE on UNIQUE index for hash-gated config snapshots
alternatives_rejected: Option A — explicit-SELECT-first (diverges from 21+ INSERT OR IGNORE sites, adds SELECT round-trip per session_start, loses rowcount-gated _index() observation)
